verified: Root/Core, GitHub, Nexus release, and BETA latest resolve to v2.4.13-beta.14.
GitHub and Nexus expose the preferred darwin/arm64, linux/x64, and win32/x64 assets.
GitHub and Nexus host downloads are byte-identical to manifest/GitHub SHA-256.
All three Nexus signed download endpoints return valid redirects and the host download reaches binary bytes.
Downloaded app version, arm64 architecture, executable mode, and isolated packaged runtime match the target.

publishedReleaseFailures.detail: Core signature fields are missing; linux/x64 is duplicated; macOS and Windows names fail the release validator.
GitHub has no signature sidecars; Nexus assets have no signatureUrl; signature endpoints return 404; signing public key is not configured.
The bundle is ad-hoc signed with no TeamIdentifier and deep strict codesign verification fails.
The host reports override=security disabled, so it cannot provide valid Gatekeeper acceptance evidence.

optionalAppleDeveloperSecrets: APPLE_API_KEY_CONTENT + APPLE_API_KEY_ID + APPLE_API_ISSUER, or APPLE_ID + APPLE_APP_SPECIFIC_PASSWORD + APPLE_TEAM_ID
